### LinkedIn

Enabled: true

Preparing for technical interviews requires a solid grasp of Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA). CodeGrind's learning paths offer a structured approach to mastering DSA, addressing common challenges like fragmented practice and lack of guidance. Our platform features difficulty-based problem filtering (Easy, Medium, Hard), real-time code execution with immediate feedback via Azure Judge0, and AI-powered guidance that offers hints without spoiling solutions. Gamified milestones and a scoring system further enhance engagement and track your growth. Learn how CodeGrind transforms your DSA preparation and builds genuine problem-solving skills.
